narrative: Poor data health. Critical violations need immediate remediation.

top_violations.plain_language: Found 5 confidence values on 0-100 scale instead of 0.0-1.0. This breaks all downstream consumers that expect values between 0 and 1.

top_violations.message: Found 5 integer confidence values (should be float)
top_violations.plain_language: Found integer confidence values where floats are expected. This causes type mismatch errors in consumers.

recommended_actions.action: Fix confidence scale in extraction pipeline
recommended_actions.details: Update extractor.py to output float in [0.0, 1.0] instead of integer 0-100
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Eliminates CRITICAL violations affecting 2 downstream consumers

recommended_actions.details: Run migration script to convert existing 0-100 values to 0.0-1.0 scale
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Fixes existing records with scale issues

recommended_actions.details: Run validation before allowing commits to prevent future schema drift
recommended_actions.risk_reduction: Prevents confidence scale changes from reaching production
